title: Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution (Log4Shell)
description: The Apache Log4j library is vulnerable to unauthenticated remote code execution via JNDI injection.
remediation: Update Log4j to version 2.17.1 or higher.
notes: Found running inside the Tomcat container.

title: SMB Signing Not Required
description: SMB signing is not enforced on the target host allowing for NTLM relay attacks.
remediation: Enforce SMB signing via Group Policy.

title: Anonymous FTP Access
description: The FTP server allows anonymous login exposing sensitive internal documents.
notes: Exposed config files found on the share.
